title: Allow if the user has any required role
prompt_md:
A user can have multiple roles, and a route can accept any of several roles. Implement `is_allowed(user_roles, required_roles)` → `bool`: return `True` if **any** of the user's roles appears in `required_roles`, else `False`.

This is the "OR" style check: "editors OR admins may access this."
hints: Turning `required_roles` into a set makes the membership test fast and clean.
`return any(r in set(required_roles) for r in user_roles)`.
